creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your patch.

Could you please update the patch to reflect resurrecting it as 'py-python-poppler-qt5', and bring the portname in line with its upstream canonical and registered PyPI (CHEESESHOP) name: python-poppler:

- PORTNAME python-poppler (DISTNAME override no longer necessary)
- PKGNAMESUFFIX=-qt5

I'm not entirely familiar with port/pkgnaming conventions/standards for qt/gnome, but, since qt4 has been deprecated, if a -qt5 suffix is not required, that can be dropped too (unless its mandatory, CC tcberner for feedback)
